texto: When you look in the mirror, your difficult sibling always looks back, though the image is distorted. In the shadows lurk parts of yourself and your past that you don't want to notice. Behind the reflection, silently influencing the interaction, stand your parents, your grandparents, and all their siblings.
explicacao: Citação de Jeanne Safer Jeanne Safer Ph.D. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “When you look in the mirror, your difficult sibling always looks back, though the image is distor…” articula reflexao, psychology, mirror em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
